Petition For Instructions; To Determine Distribution Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Continued To Mar-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Toni Coaston, Esq. for Rosa Gutierrez and Maria Garcia (Petitioners). Vernon Goins, Esq. for Joe Garcia-Cano (Respondent/Objector/Successor Trustee of the Trust).

Ms. Coaston informed the Court that the parties are set to participate in mediation on February 23, 2023, and requested a continuance to a date following mediation. Both counsel confirm for the Court that they are participating in private mediation. The Court stated that it will grant a continance, that it is setting status on mediation for the same date, and ordered counsel to submit a one-page joint mediation statement one week prior to the new date. The Court noted that at the next calling of the case that counsel should be prepared to receive some structure from the Court with regard to a trial date.

The Petition for Instructions; to Determine Distribution of Trust is continued to March 22, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A status on mediation is also set for March 22, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The joint mediation statement is due by March 15, 2023.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.

Petition For Instructions; To Determine Distribution Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Jan-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions; To Determine Distribution Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Dec-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Talbot, via Zoom, for Rosa Gutierrez, and Maria Garcia, Petitioners; Vernon Goins, via Zoom, for and with Joe Garciacano, Objector.

The court queries Mr. Talbot regarding diligence of service to Steven Garcia and Rene Garcia. Mr. Talbot reports of having requested addresses for each with one refusing to do so and not receiving a response from the other. The court advises that Mr. Talbot's efforts are not diligent in the court's view. Mr. Goins advises that his client is ready to provide Mr. Talbot with his brothers' addresses. Mr. Garciacano reports that his brothers did not their addresses disclosed but provides last known addresses for Steven and Rene to Mr. Talbot, on the record. Mr. Talbot requests that the court waive notice to Steven and Rene. The court denies Mr. Talbot's request and orders the parties to meet and confer regarding the service issue.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Dec-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
